perks.name: Lucky Catcher
perks.desc: **percent%** chance of **doubling** cats on catch.

perks.name: Gambling Catcher
perks.desc: **percent%** chance of **tripling** cats on catch, but **triple_none**% chance of getting **no** cats on catch.

perks.name: Pack Catcher - Wooden
perks.desc: **percent%** chance of getting a **wooden pack** on catch.

perks.name: Pack Catcher - Stone
perks.desc: **percent%** chance of getting a **stone pack** on catch.

perks.name: Pack Catcher - Bronze
perks.desc: **percent%** chance of getting a **bronze pack** on catch.

perks.name: Pack Catcher - Silver
perks.desc: **percent%** chance of getting a **silver pack** on catch.

perks.name: Pack Catcher - Gold
perks.desc: **percent%** chance of getting a **gold pack** on catch.

perks.name: Pack Catcher - Platinum
perks.desc: **percent%** chance of getting a **platinum pack** on catch.

perks.name: Bright Catcher
perks.desc: **percent%** chance of prisms boosting catches by **two rarity levels**.

perks.name: Purrcise Catcher
perks.desc: Getting **Purrfection or All The Same** times on catch **triples** cats recieved.

perks.name: Time Manipulator
perks.desc: **percent%** chance of adding **5 minutes** to catnip timer on catch.

perks.name: Voting Booster
perks.desc: Your vote streak **(timer_add_streak)** boosts catnip duration.

perks.name: Rainy Catcher
perks.desc: **percent%** chance of starting a rain with **10** cats.

perks.name: Speedrunner
perks.desc: The first **percent** cats cought each level always **double**.

perks.name: Efficient Hunter
perks.desc: Gain **percent%** extra XP from catches.

perks.name: Catnip Extender
perks.desc: Catnip timer lasts **percent%** longer.

perks.name: Pack Guarantor
perks.desc: **percent%** chance of guaranteed pack on catch.

perks.name: Critical Catcher
perks.desc: **percent%** chance of **doubling rarity** on catch.

perks.name: Momentum
perks.desc: Each consecutive catch grants **percent%** bonus damage (max 10x).

perks.name: Legendary Magnet
perks.desc: **percent%** increased chance to catch **Legendary** or better.

perks.name: Mass Catcher
perks.desc: **percent%** chance of catching **2-3 cats** per catch.

perks.name: Bounty Hunter
perks.desc: Bounties reward **percent%** more cats.

perks.name: Safe Bet
perks.desc: Gambling commands have **percent%** better odds.

perks.name: Immortal
perks.desc: Catnip timer never expires. Ever.

quotes.first: Welcome to the Cattito Mafia. May your reflexes be swift.
normal: The cats are watching.
The underworld awaits.
Catnip flows through these streets.
quotes.levelup: You've made your first step into darkness.
quotes.leveldown: Perhaps you weren't ready after all.

quotes.first: Welcome to the Mafia. You can't trust anyone here.
normal: Oh, I've seen many great things. You couldn't even imagine the places I've been to. Good ol' times.
Just get those cats, okay? My days are numbered, it's about time I retire.
You seem to be an odd fellow… but you have good intentions, right? Then catch those cats and get moving!
The cats... they speak to me sometimes. Do they speak to you?
I've been in this business longer than I care to remember. Long enough to know when someone has potential.
Watch your back out there. Not everyone wants to see you succeed.
levelup: You've won! Go on and conquer. Make me proud.
You deserve this. No need to worry about me.
Impressive. Very impressive. Keep this up.
quotes.leveldown: you had to get like 2 cats how did you mess this up

quotes.first: Ha! You will never defeat me! I am the best cat catcher of all my ancestors!
normal: FEAR ME! I am the agent of your demise. This app on my phone told me so.
You will never win. I have bested hundreds, no, THOUSANDS of cat catchers before you. Who are they? uhhhhhhh
Cat spawn. No catch. I grab. All cat mine.
My father taught me everything. Everything!!! ...Except where he actually went.
You think you're strong? I've been training since birth for this moment!
The cats tremble at the mere mention of my name. They call me... the Cat Whisperer.
levelup: WHAT?! How could this be…
I have failed you, dad… I'm sorry…
This is impossible! My training... it wasn't enough!
quotes.leveldown: Ha! Never even doubted my skills.

quotes.first: heyyy. been hearing a lot about you. welcome, welcome
normal: bro you ever try any of this catnip stuff yourself? u gotta give it a shot, i tell ya, it's something else
the whole mafia thing is ridiculous, don't even get involved. i'm just here for cheaper catnip lol
dude the other day i had this green fella, he took too much, ended up going crazy. me?? nah come on ill be fine
psst... between you and me, the boss isn't even real. it's just an AI or something.
you trying to climb the ranks? pfft. just enjoy the ride, my dude.
seen a lot of people come and go. most of them... well... let's not talk about where they went.
levelup: leaving already? aw. come back anytime
yo you actually beat me? damn, that's wild.

quotes.first: I LOVE CAT BOT IT IS GREAT NOW THERE IS A NEW UPDATE!!!!!
normal: YO MY NAME IS JEREMY MY PARENTS LEFT WHEN I WAS THREE!!!!
THERE IS JUST A SINGLE RULE JEREMY IS REALLY COOL!!!!!!!
I AM COOL AND I AM GREEN BETTER THAN AT FIRST IT MAY SEEM!!!!!!
EVERYTHING IS AWESOME!!!!!! LIFE IS AMAZING!!!!
I COLLECT CATS AND THEY ARE THE BEST THING EVER!!!!
WHY AM I SHOUTING I DON'T EVEN KNOW ANYMORE!!!!
levelup: HI MY NAME IS ALMOST DEAD MY LIFE HANGING ON A THREAD
NOOOOOOOO THIS CANNOT BE HAPPENING!!!!!

quotes.first: Hello. My name is Lucian. You beat my son. Prepare to die.
normal: You couldnt have beat my son. YOU CHEATER!!
I have been here for ALL ETERNITY! Almost as if I'm hard-coded… by some developer…
I'm the best cat catcher ever! [NOT CLICKBAIT]
FEAR ME! I am the uhhhhhh okay the phone app isn't working
My son was weak. You, however... you might actually be dangerous.
I've forgotten more about catching cats than you'll ever know.
They say I'm immortal. I've never bothered to test that claim.
levelup: Son… I'm sorry. I'm so sorry.
It appears the student has become the master.
Interesting. Very interesting indeed.

quotes.first: Another one? Why do you commoners keep trying? You're just a waste of my time.
normal: Ugh, give up already!
Oh, please. You're pathetic.
You're so naïve thinking you even have a chance to pass me.
I was born into wealth and power. What are you? Nothing.
These cats belong to me. They always have. They always will.
Your ambition is... almost cute. Like a kitten.
levelup: This can't be possible! NO! Guards, seize them!! NOOOOO!!!
My empire... crumbling before my eyes...
You may have won this battle, but the war is far from over!
quotes.leveldown: Serves you right. Those like you don't deserve my attention.

quotes.first: Another boss. Really? You know what happened to everyone else who tried to take me on.
normal: WHAT DO YOU MEAN THE PATCH OF CATA DI- Oh, hello!
These cats need to be- They need to be appreciated!
Dogs are really bad, right? Yeah! I hate dogs!
You know, I used to be like you once. Young, hungry for power.
The cats speak through me. I am merely a vessel for their will.
Underestimate me and you'll regret it. Ask the others who tried.
levelup: ...This isn't where my story ends. Not today.
No... this can't be real...
You've awakened something in me. Something primal.
quotes.leveldown: Seems like I'm the superior species after all.

quotes.first: That guy was a dog? Yeah, that checks out.
normal: It's not always about the money… it's about the PAWS BABY LOVE THE PAWS COME ON HIT A HOME RUN
Back in the day we just scammed people and made them pay higher and higher prices for catnip. Some people even paid 100 eGirl cats!
Catnip really depends on who makes it and what they put into it. We here at the top? We get the best stuff. Those people at the bottom get basically nothing.
Why are you even trying to go any further? Don't you have enough already?
I've bought and sold entire empires. You think a little upstart like you scares me?
The money... oh, the money is intoxicating. But it's nothing compared to the power.
I hold secrets that would topple governments. What do you hold?
levelup: Oh, you actually beat me? Whatever. I'm still the kingpin in all the other people's dimensions.
I don't care if you beat me. I'm still in charge for every other player.
This is merely a setback. I have contingency plans for contingency plans.
quotes.leveldown: I wasn't even trying how did you lose 💀

quotes.first: Oh hey! You're here. Right on time. You will love this to death!
normal: You ever heard of that cat, Whiskers? Well he's back in business. What's he up to man, what's he doing...
I'm here to make sure business is running in order. You're pushing it with the mafia overtake.
Relentlessly moving up and defeating everyone on the way, I want to know, what is your goal here? I just wanna hear the story.
And your bail will be… 7 million fine cats!
Yeah, I never sleep much. With these bounties, neither will you.
I've seen empires rise and fall. I've seen men become legends and legends become dust.
You're talented, I'll give you that. But talent alone won't save you from what's coming.
The seat at the top... it's not a blessing. It's a curse.
levelup: hahahashahhashaHSHAHAHSHAHSAHAAH
Impossible... you've actually done it...
The prophecy... it comes true at last.
quotes.leveldown: And look who we have here! The one and only. Too bad your perks don't give you armor.

quotes.first: Well done. You've destroyed everything I made. Are you happy?
normal: Was it really worth it?
I built this mafia from the ground up. I thought you would save it, not destroy it.
I knew you could go a long way. But I didn't expect you to get here.
Why did you go further? You defeated the dog. That should've been enough.
meow
You've seen the darkness now. Can you live with what you've become?
The cats have chosen you. I only hope you're worthy of that choice.
Everything comes full circle. Here we are, back where it all started.
levelup: I should've expected this.
You refuse to fall.
Perhaps... you're the one meant to rebuild.
quotes.leveldown: Finally. You have fallen. I get to rebuild what you destroyed.

quotes.first: So... you've come seeking the truth. Very well.
normal: I see all timelines. In most, you fail. In some... you transcend.
The cats are not mere creatures. They are echoes of something far greater.
You wonder if this is all real? Does it matter?
Every choice you've made brought you here. Every defeat. Every victory.
I am neither your enemy nor your ally. I simply... am.
The next level requires sacrifice. Are you prepared to pay the price?
Whiskers, Lucian, Sofia... all pawns in a game older than time itself.
levelup: The barriers shatter. Reality bends to your will.
You have transcended. Welcome to the true game.
Few ever reach this far. Fewer still survive.
quotes.leveldown: Reality reasserts itself. You were not meant for this.

bounties.desc: Catch X type or rarer cats

levels.name: Kingpin
levels.change:
Better Perks
It might be time to stop.

levels.name: El Patrón
levels.change:
Literally Nothing
Really, you shouldn't do this.
